name: md_save
description: Save a Markdown string to my_data/ as a .md file with automatic versioning. Archives any existing file with the same name before overwriting. Use at the end of workflows to persist fill_template output or canvas content.

content.description: Markdown string to write. Pass the 'content' field returned by fill_template, or any markdown string.

filename.description: Target filename including .md extension. E.g. cpty_intel_Goldman_Sachs_2025-12-31.md. The .md extension is added automatically if omitted.

subfolder.description: Sub-folder within my_data/ to save into. Created automatically if it does not exist. Default: root of my_data/. E.g. counterparty_briefs

path.description: Absolute path of the saved file.

archived.description: True if a previous version was archived before saving.

archive_path.description: Path to the archived version (only if archived=true).
